Flow.description: V1: Inject Hours and Minutes value into time entry based off of ClockifyDuration which is ingested through Pabbly integration between Clockify and Salesforce.

formulas.description: Used to parse out the hour value from the bclockify__clockifyDuration__c for printing to the bclockify__Hours__c
formulas.name: IntegrationHourValue

formulas.description: Used to parse out the hour value from the bclockify__clockifyDuration__c for printing to the bclockify__Minutes__c
formulas.name: IntegrationMinuteValue
formulas.expression: VALUE( IF( CONTAINS({!$Record.bclockify__clockifyDuration__c}, 'H'), MID( {!$Record.bclockify__clockifyDuration__c}, FIND('H', {!$Record.bclockify__clockifyDuration__c}) + 1, FIND('M', {!$Record.bclockify__clockifyDuration__c}) - FIND('H', {!$Record.bclockify__clockifyDuration__c}) - 1 ), MID( {!$Record.bclockify__clockifyDuration__c}, 3, FIND('M', {!$Record.bclockify__clockifyDuration__c}) - 3 ) ) )

Flow.label: Time Entry Create Before Save

recordUpdates.description: Set the time values parsed in formulas. This will allow for Duration to print
recordUpdates.name: Set_Time_Values
recordUpdates.label: Set Time Values
